description.value:
Your affinity for the natural world helps you see the connections between organisms no matter the environment you're in. Xenofey gnomes often search out uncolonized planets where they can live in balance with the natural world or join terraforming colonies, utilizing both their mechanical and magical mastery to spread life across the galaxy. Many xenofey gnomes revel in the discovery of new species and show a keen interest in the fantastical creatures of alien planets and deep space.

You become trained in Nature. If you would automatically become trained in Nature (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. Once per day, if you're on a planet, you can gain the ability to speak and understand a language that is commonly spoken by the people on it. You lose this knowledge during your next daily preparations.
